Star System Set: Salutian (FULL SET)

SALUTIAN STAR SYSTEM SET
by Michael O. Holland
The
jungle
planet of Mien is home to danger, mystery, and some of the galaxy's finest starship foundries. Monsters prowl the jungle floors while
silver cities seems to float among the canopy. And all across the
wildlands, the sound of finely tuned
engines roaring into the sky echoes over an alien
landscape
. For the
locals
consider it a sacred duty
to explore the galaxy
, q
uesting
endlessley
after their lost
g
oddess,
Maltur
.

S
tar System Sets offer new planets to explore, dangers to overcome, lifeforms to study, and cultures to document. Modular enough for any campaign, each double-sided card presents a complete ruleset for ease of reference, allowing GMs to fill in the blank spots on their star charts.

Card
types include
Race, Planet, Charact
er Options, Equipment
, Monsters, and Mini-Adventure. Each set is available
? la carte or as a six-card bundle.
Adapted for Fantasy Grounds by: Robin Wischnewski
Requires: The free Fantasy Grounds virtual tabletop (VTT) software and a one time purchase of the Starfinder ruleset.
Screenshots may differ from what you see in-game based on the extension and ruleset you have loaded.
